title: stelis fissurosa
intro: Stelis fissurosa, also known as the split-lip orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, with its medicinal properties attributed to its alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis fissurosa include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory infections. Stelis fissurosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in natural remedies.
